title: VR Angel 4 x 4m Christmas Wrapping Paper Roll - Contemporary Style Gift Wrap Rolls Four Assorted Festive Designs Trees, Snowflakes, Script & Stars
features: 🎄 𝐕𝐚𝐥𝐮𝐞 𝐏𝐚𝐜𝐤 – Includes 4 rolls of Christmas wrapping paper, each measuring 4m long, giving you a total of 16 metres of festive gift wrap for stylish and professional-looking Christmas presents.
✨ 𝐌𝐨𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐧 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐚𝐫𝐲 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧𝐬 – Features 4 assorted stylish Christmas patterns with a contemporary festive look, perfect for adding elegance and seasonal charm to your gifts.
✂️ 𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐲 𝐓𝐨 𝐂𝐮𝐭 & 𝐅𝐨𝐥𝐝 – Designed for convenience, the wrapping paper cuts smoothly and folds crisply, ensuring a tidy and professional finish for all your presents
🎁 𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡 𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 & 𝐃𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 – Made from premium-quality paper that is easy to fold, resists tearing, and ensures your gifts look neat and beautifully wrapped every time.
🏠 𝐏𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐞𝐜𝐭 𝐅𝐨𝐫 𝐀𝐧𝐲 𝐎𝐜𝐜𝐚𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧 – Ideal for Christmas gifts, festive hampers, decorative projects, and more. Perfect for use at home, in schools, offices, or for holiday parties and celebrations.
description: Product Description Elevate Your Christmas Gifting with 4 x 8M Festive Wrapping Paper Rolls – Choose from Cute, Tartan, Contemporary, and Traditional Designs! Make Every Gift Special with Christmas Decorations from VR Angel. Traditional and Time-Honored Appeal :- Traditional designs that capture the spirit of the season or celebration. Ideal for those who appreciate classic aesthetics and want to maintain cherished holiday traditions. It’s All About Sharing :- While Christmas for some is all about sharing feelings and presents Christmas is also probably by far the best holiday. There are so many different things to put you into the Christmas spirit.Using a gift bag when wrapping your presents saves you time, energy and money. Wide Uses :- These Christmas Paper Bags are suitable for many occasions. As a Party Treat Bags for children's birthday parties, Christmas, baby showers, as a wrap for gifts, candies, cookies, snacks and more. As storage bags for small items for grocery, shopping center, etc. Previous page Four Different Design :- Christmas wrapping paper roll comes in four different color and assorted designs. Wrap with Style :- Our wrapping paper rolls comes in modern design for fashionable personality. Premium Quality :- Christmas wrapping paper rolls are made of premium quality material, which is truly a green choice. Next page 1 Traditional Wrap Paper 2 Tartan Wrapping Paper 3 Cute Wrapping Paper Who Doesn’t Love Christmas :- Giving some presents to your friends and family members will always make them happy. This Christmas you can be the Santa and do the job in your family! You can focus on thinking about presents, we already thought the best packaging combines for you. Christmas Gift Bags Santa List Gift Bag Add To Basket Cute Santa Jumbo Gift Bag Buying Options Traditional Gift Bag Buying Options Fragile Jumbo Gift Bag Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 75 4.7 out of 5 stars 5 4.7 out of 5 stars 5 4.7 out of 5 stars 5 Price £8.97 £ 8 . 97 — — — 3 Sizes ✔ ✘ ✘ ✘ Jumbo Bag ✘ ✔ ✔ ✔ Twisty Rope Handles ✔ ✘ ✘ ✘ Woven Bag ✘ ✔ ✔ ✔ Handle Tag ✔ ✘ ✘ ✘ Are there any additional items included with the wrapping paper? Yes, the paper comes with a pack of 20 matching foil Christmas gift tags. These tags are perfect for writing your own special message to your loved ones. Is this wrapping paper suitable for all your Christmas presents? Yes, it's designed to be the perfect wrapping paper for all your Christmas presents for family and friends. Why is finding new and creative ways to wrap Christmas presents considered part of the festive fun? Wrapping Christmas presents creatively adds to the festive spirit and makes gift-giving even more special, allowing for personal expression and surprise. What is the primary material used in the Christmas Gift Paper Bag? The primary material used for these gift paper bags is good quality Craft paper material, known for its durability and sturdiness. What are the key features that make these gift bags versatile for various occasions? The key features that make these gift bags versatile are the quality Craft paper material, which is durable and sturdy, and their suitability for a wide range of occasions, providing a practical and stylish gift-packing solution.
